title: dittrichia
intro: Dittrichia is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, also known as horse-heal or false chamomile, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Dittrichia include relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
